value="Shutdown &nbsp;Sequence" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="260" x="40" y="750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="d13W0snEgWHSCef7Ce8h-14" parent="d13W0snEgWHSCef7Ce8h-9" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFFFF);" value="<div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">① &nbsp;ONBATT → ntfy alert</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">② &nbsp;LOWBATT ( ≤ 20%) → FSD triggered</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">③ &nbsp;ZimaBoard 2 shuts down → network dies</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">④ &nbsp;HOSTSYNC wait (60s)</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">⑤ &nbsp;Tiered ACPI drain: 4→3→2→1</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">⑥ &nbsp;Cubi NUC host shutdown</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">⑦ &nbsp;FINALDELAY (15s) → killpower</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="203" width="250" x="10" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FZI8V6YM2_8PdJU4sy1o-2" parent="1" value="Recovery Sequence" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="220" x="360" y="750" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FZI8V6YM2_8PdJU4sy1o-3" parent="FZI8V6YM2_8PdJU4sy1o-2" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">① &nbsp;Power restored</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">② &nbsp;Zimaboard 2 auto-boots</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">③ &nbsp;OPNSense restores routing</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">④ &nbsp;Cubi NUC boots → services start</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);">⑤ &nbsp;ntfy sends online state</div><div style="caret-color: rgb(255, 174, 205);"><br></div><div
